== Notes for [[Item:Q78038|Q78038]] ==

Flavius Areobindus Dagalaiphus (ca 460 - 546) was Magister Militum from 503 to 504 and Roman Consul in 506. He was a son of Flavius Dagalaiphus (ca 430 - aft. 461), Roman Consul in 461, and wife Godisthea (b. ca 445).

See / Lásd:

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Flavius_Areobindus_Dagalaiphus

Godisthea

Husband/Partner: Dagalaifus

Child: Areobindus

Father: Flavius Ardabur Aspar (405? - 471)

Grandfather: Flavius Ardabur of the Alans

Forrás / Source:

http://freepages.genealogy.rootsweb.com/~jamesdow/s065/f682046.htm

Godisthea (?)1

b. circa 435

Father Flavius Ardabur Aspar (?)1 b. circa 405, d. 471

Godisthea (?) was born circa 435.

She was the daughter of Flavius Ardabur Aspar (?).1

Godisthea (?) married Dagalaifus (?), son of Areobindus (?), before 460.1

Family Dagalaifus (?) b. circa 430

Child ◦Areobindus (?)+ b. c 4601

Forrás / Source:

http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/p147.htm

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
